title: Origins: Charmstruck
description: An origin that can gain charms from mobs and apply them to armour.
body:
# 🎟️ **Charmstruck**

### **(Magic Jam Origin)**

_Enigmatic gatherers that are drawn to adventures, their journey was disrupted by a vision of mystical energies scattered over the universe._

# List of Powers

<details>
<summary>❤️‍🩹 Expertise</summary>

You can harvest energy from enemies, and when they die, they drop Vitality: dust with odd qualities.
<details>
<summary>Info</summary>
Different mobs have different Vitality.

</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>🧥 Vital Vest</summary>

You can use the Vitality you've earned to upgrade armour and give them special properties.
<details>
<summary>Info</summary>
Only you are capable of wearing armour with Vitality applied. Check the other tooltip to figure out how to add or clear Vitality from armour.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Info</summary>
To apply a Vitality to armour, right-click the Vitality on the armour in your inventory. You can withdraw Vitality from armour. To remove a Vitality, right-click the selected armour piece with magma cream. Check the other tooltip to learn how to mend armour easier.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Info</summary>
Using the high levels of XP inside quartz, you can repair armour by right-clicking quartz on that piece.

</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>💔 Enigmatic Curse</summary>

The knowledge of Vitality took a toll on your strength, decreasing the damage you deal.

</details>

<details>
<summary>😵‍💫 Pursuit of Knowledge</summary>

Years of learning Vitality made your body fragile, decreasing your natural regeneration and max health by 3 hearts.

</details>

# Additional
I have spent days working on it, but fortunately, it's not as difficult as I had anticipated. I don't think it has any significant drawbacks. It won't be as amazing as some other people's, but I think I unintentionally put more work into this jam than I intended to.

- Coding this has been fun; I had no idea how to do it, so it's been a fantastic learning experience. I also completed it really quickly.
